content: Accessibility for motion-heavy sites: must detect prefers-reduced-motion and swap/disable CSS and JS-driven animation at code level (decorative motion can trigger vestibular/migraine/seizure issues). Every interactive element (including canvas controls) must be keyboard operable in logical tab order with no traps; never outline:none without a replacement focus style (WCAG 2.2 requires 3:1 contrast focus indicator, plus target-size and dragging-alternative criteria). WCAG 2.2 is the 2025+ baseline standard.
